response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong senior-level software engineering expertise and architectural thinking across 14+ years, the role requires specialized hardware design knowledge (SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, AI accelerator optimization) that is entirely absent from this resume. His background is exclusively in software systems and web infrastructure, not hardware design or silicon-level optimization. This represents a fundamental domain mismatch rather than a gap that could be quickly closed.
strengths: Principal-level engineering maturity with 14+ years of experience and multiple staff roles demonstrating technical leadership
Proven performance optimization skills from low-latency systems work (handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Strong system architecture and infrastructure background with cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and microservices design
concerns: Zero hardware design, SoC modeling, or IP architecture experience—the core technical requirement for the role
No background in GPU architecture, AI accelerator optimization, or hardware-software co-design despite role's focus on AI accelerator performance
Career entirely in software/web domain (backends, GIS platforms, fintech) with no chip design, silicon, or hardware-level optimization experience

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and chip design background
Senior IC seniority level and architectural thinking
